positive: A retro-futuristic scene featuring a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a flying vehicle. Synthwave aesthetic, vibrant magenta and electric blue color palette, geometric grid lines, chrome reflections, 80s vaporwave style, high contrast, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural lighting, sepia, muddy colors
